stack: Laravel 12 + Inertia.js v2 + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4
summary: Production-grade SaaS starter with strong foundations but 6 critical and 12 high-severity findings across authorization, webhook security, billing race conditions, test coverage gaps, and frontend XSS patterns.

findings.title: Feature flag global override not restricted to super admin
findings.description: updateGlobal() accepts any admin user. Regular admins can toggle billing, api_tokens, or any global flag, disrupting product availability and revenue. FeatureFlagService blacklists only 'admin' flag but not billing/api_tokens/social_auth.
findings.remediation: Add abort_unless($request->user()?->isSuperAdmin(), 403) or explicit Gate/Policy check before global override mutations.

findings.title: Webhook replay protection disabled for non-Stripe providers
findings.description: Timestamp validation only applies to Stripe webhooks. For GitHub and custom providers, $timestamp is null and replay protection is completely bypassed. Combined with missing idempotency checks in IncomingWebhookService, webhooks can be replayed indefinitely.
findings.remediation: Enforce replay protection for ALL providers via nonce/request-id tracking in cache. Reject webhooks without timestamp or delivery ID.

findings.title: Unbounded admin dashboard queries without time-window limits
findings.description: Multiple admin endpoints perform COUNT(*) on entire webhook_deliveries, endpoints, and incoming_webhooks tables with no WHERE clause on timeframe. Webhook spam could cause admin dashboard to hang or OOM.
findings.remediation: Add time-window filters (e.g., created_at >= now()->subDays(30)) and aggressive caching with short TTLs.

findings.title: dangerouslySetInnerHTML without DOMPurify in JSON-LD components
findings.description: BreadcrumbJsonLd, FaqJsonLd, and 9+ guide/compare pages use dangerouslySetInnerHTML with only basic </script> escaping. Comment explicitly states 'DOMPurify omitted'. While content is currently hardcoded, this creates maintenance risk and is inconsistent with Blog/Pricing pages that do use DOMPurify.
findings.remediation: Wrap all JSON-LD schema injection with DOMPurify.sanitize(). Standardize pattern across all pages.

findings.title: 59/63 Form Requests have zero test coverage
findings.description: Only 4 Form Requests are tested (LoginRequest, RegisterRequest, ProfileUpdateRequest, UpdateSettingRequest). 59 validation rule sets are untested including billing, admin, webhook, and settings requests. Invalid input could bypass validation silently.
findings.remediation: Add validation tests for all Form Requests, prioritizing billing and admin requests.

findings.title: Zero test coverage for background jobs
findings.description: 5 background jobs (PersistAuditLog, DispatchWebhookJob, DispatchAnalyticsEvent, CancelOrphanedStripeSubscription, etc.) have no tests. Job failures in production would be undetected.
findings.remediation: Add unit tests for each job covering success path, failure/retry behavior, and edge cases.

findings.title: Lock timeout too short for billing operations
findings.description: Redis lock defaults to 35 seconds. If Stripe API is slow (>35s), lock auto-releases and concurrent request bypasses it, causing duplicate subscriptions. No Stripe idempotency keys used on API calls.
findings.remediation: Increase lock timeout to 120s+. Implement Stripe idempotency keys on ALL subscription mutations. Log lock timeout events as alerts.

findings.title: Audit logs retained indefinitely with no GDPR deletion mechanism
findings.description: Audit logs include full IP addresses and user agents with no automatic pruning configured by default. No mechanism to purge logs for GDPR/CCPA deletion requests. PruneAuditLogs command exists but isn't scheduled.
findings.remediation: Schedule automatic pruning. Add user-deletion cascade for audit logs. Encrypt or anonymize IP/User-Agent after retention period.

findings.title: CSV injection vulnerability in admin exports
findings.description: CSV exports stream raw database values without sanitizing control characters. If user_name contains =cmd|'/C powershell...', Excel will execute it. No audit log of who exported what data.
findings.remediation: Prefix cells starting with =, +, -, @ with single quote. Add audit logging for all export operations.

findings.title: No rate limiting on billing operations
findings.description: subscribe, cancel, swap, updateQuantity endpoints have no rate limiting. User could flood Stripe API with rapid plan swaps, cancel/resume cycles, or checkout session creation.
findings.remediation: Add throttle:5,60 middleware to all subscription mutation routes.

findings.title: Webhook endpoint URL allows private/localhost targets
findings.description: URL validation uses 'url:https,http' but doesn't prevent localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.x, 172.x, 192.168.x, or other private IPs. Attacker could create webhook pointing to internal services (Redis, databases).
findings.remediation: Add custom NotPrivateIp validation rule that blocks RFC1918, loopback, and link-local addresses.

findings.title: Admin panel access attempts not rate-limited
findings.description: Middleware logs unauthorized access but doesn't rate-limit attempts. Attacker can rapidly probe admin panel endpoints and generate large audit logs, potentially causing log table bloat.
findings.remediation: Add RateLimiter::hit() with 10 attempts per 60 seconds window for non-admin users hitting admin routes.

findings.title: PlanLimitService cache TTL only 10 seconds causes stampedes
findings.description: getUserPlan() caches for only 10 seconds. When cache expires, simultaneous requests all hit database + Stripe. With high-traffic users, this causes query storms every 10 seconds.
findings.remediation: Increase TTL to 3600s with proactive invalidation on subscription changes. Use Cache::lock() to serialize refresh.

findings.title: Trial start not wrapped in transaction
findings.description: startTrial() uses atomic WHERE NULL UPDATE but isn't wrapped in DB::transaction(). If AuditService::logProductEvent() fails, trial is set but not logged. Concurrent requests could both pass NULL check.
findings.remediation: Wrap in DB::transaction(). Add UNIQUE constraint on (user_id, trial_starts_at).

findings.title: CI coverage and security checks non-blocking
findings.description: JS coverage, bundle size check, and npm audit (high) all use continue-on-error: true. Coverage failures, bundle bloat, and high-severity npm vulnerabilities don't block PR merges.
findings.remediation: Remove continue-on-error: true from JS coverage and npm audit (high). Keep bundle size as warning initially.

findings.title: 14/16 console commands untested
findings.description: Only 2 of 16 console commands have tests (SendReEngagementEmails, PruneAuditLogs). Untested commands include SendDunningReminders, webhooks:prune-stale, and subscription management commands.
findings.remediation: Add tests for all cron-triggered commands covering success, error handling, and edge cases.

findings.title: 3 core services completely untested
findings.description: LeadScoringService, LifecycleService, and DataHealthService have zero test coverage. These services contain business logic around user lifecycle and data quality.
findings.remediation: Add unit tests for each service with mocked dependencies.

findings.title: 3 high-severity npm dependency vulnerabilities
findings.description: lodash-es (template code injection, prototype pollution), picomatch (method injection, ReDoS), brace-expansion (memory exhaustion). All have fixes available via npm audit fix.
findings.remediation: Run npm audit fix immediately.

findings.title: Export routes missing 'verified' middleware
findings.description: General export routes only require auth + throttle. Unverified email users can export data.
findings.remediation: Add 'verified' middleware to export route group.

findings.title: CSP allows unsafe-inline for styles
findings.description: Content Security Policy allows 'unsafe-inline' for styles due to Tailwind JIT. This weakens protection against style-injection attacks.
findings.remediation: Document risk. Consider nonce-based style loading or build step to extract inline styles.

findings.title: Contact form name field not sanitized for HTML
findings.description: Name validation blocks newlines but allows HTML tags. If name is used in email templates without escaping, XSS is possible.
findings.remediation: Add strip_tags or CleanString validation rule to name field.

findings.title: AuditLog toDetailArray/toSummaryArray triggers lazy loading
findings.description: Accessing $this->user?->name in array methods causes N+1 when audit logs queried without eager loading.
findings.remediation: Add scopeWithUser() and enforce usage in controllers querying audit logs.

findings.title: WebhookService loads all endpoints then filters in memory
findings.description: dispatch() loads all endpoints for a user, then filters by active status in memory instead of at database level.
findings.remediation: Add ->where('active', true) to the Eloquent query before ->get().

findings.title: Webhook dispatch job timeout shorter than retry window
findings.description: $timeout = 60 but HTTP request timeout(30) * 3 retries = 90s, exceeding job timeout. Job killed mid-retry.
findings.remediation: Increase job timeout to 150s or reduce retries to 2.

findings.title: DispatchWebhookJob missing failed() method
findings.description: Job has $tries = 3 but no failed() method. When retries exhaust, delivery stays in processing state with no notification to user.
findings.remediation: Add failed() method to mark delivery as dead-lettered and optionally notify endpoint owner.

findings.title: Stripe price env vars have no defaults - silent null
findings.description: STRIPE_PRICE_PRO etc. return null when not set, causing 500 errors during plan resolution at runtime.
findings.remediation: Add validation in AppServiceProvider::boot() that required Stripe config values are set when billing is enabled.

findings.title: Stripe webhook out-of-order rejection is per-user not per-subscription
findings.description: last_webhook_at is tracked globally per user. Events for different subscriptions (multi-subscription accounts) would be incorrectly rejected as out-of-order.
findings.remediation: Track last_webhook_at per subscription or use Stripe event IDs for deduplication.

findings.title: Grace period logic hardcoded, misaligned with Stripe dunning
findings.description: Laravel's 7-day grace period from updated_at may not match Stripe's actual retry schedule. Users could be downgraded while Stripe still considers them paying.
findings.remediation: Fetch subscription.latest_invoice.payment_intent to check actual payment state rather than relying on cached status.

findings.title: 71 tests with HTTP status-code-only assertions
findings.description: Tests verify only assertStatus(200) without checking actual state, response data, or side effects. Code could silently break while tests pass.
findings.remediation: Refactor to assert response content, database state, and side effects alongside status codes.

findings.title: SQLite test database hides MySQL-specific bugs
findings.description: Tests use SQLite in-memory while production uses MySQL. Date functions, JSON functions, LIKE escaping, and CAST behavior differ between engines.
findings.remediation: Add a CI job that runs tests against MySQL. Use QueryHelper consistently for cross-engine compatibility.

findings.title: 499 PHPStan baseline entries with reportUnmatchedIgnoredErrors disabled
findings.description: Large baseline suggests significant tech debt. Stale entries not reported due to disabled flag, potentially hiding real issues.
findings.remediation: Enable reportUnmatchedIgnoredErrors: true. Plan to reduce baseline by 50 entries per sprint.

findings.title: Frontend linting disabled in pre-commit hook
findings.description: ESLint and TypeScript checks are commented out. Frontend type errors only caught in CI, not locally.
findings.remediation: Re-enable ESLint and tsc --noEmit in pre-commit with non-blocking mode initially.

findings.title: Admin user search not rate-limited or audited
findings.description: searchUsers() endpoint allows any admin to enumerate all users by name/email with no rate limiting or audit logging.
findings.remediation: Add throttle:30,1 middleware and audit log all user searches.

findings.title: FeatureFlagService getUserOverrideCounts() not cached
findings.description: Called on every admin page load, triggers full GROUP BY query on feature_flag_overrides table every time.
findings.remediation: Cache counts for 5 minutes with AdminCacheKey invalidation.

findings.title: Unbounded subscription query in checkout
findings.description: checkout() loads all subscriptions.items without limiting to active subscriptions.
findings.remediation: Filter to active subscriptions only: ->subscriptions()->active()->limit(1).

findings.title: SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE and SESSION_ENCRYPT not set by default
findings.description: Both are commented out in .env.example. Production deployments could miss enabling secure cookies and session encryption.
findings.remediation: Add explicit defaults: SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE=true, SESSION_ENCRYPT=true with comments explaining production requirements.

findings.title: QR code section uses fixed white background in dark mode
findings.description: QR code container uses dark:bg-white making QR codes potentially unreadable. Both light and dark mode force white background.
findings.remediation: Use proper contrast: dark:bg-slate-950 or ensure QR code colors adapt to theme.

findings.title: Minimal keyboard navigation support across pages
findings.description: Only 1 tabIndex instance across all pages. Admin keyboard shortcuts exist but aren't documented in UI or discoverable.
findings.remediation: Add visible keyboard shortcuts legend. Ensure all interactive elements accessible via Tab order.

findings.title: Missing empty states in data list pages
findings.description: EmptyState component exists but isn't used in tokens, webhooks, and some admin list pages. Users see blank sections.
findings.remediation: Add conditional EmptyState rendering when data arrays are empty.

findings.title: No accessibility tests in frontend test suite
findings.description: 83 test files but none test accessibility. No axe-core or vitest-a11y integration.
findings.remediation: Add axe-core tests to component test suite for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance verification.

findings.title: Social auth errors not logged server-side
findings.description: Auth errors are caught and returned to user but no Log::error() call means issues go unnoticed in monitoring.
findings.remediation: Add Log::error() with provider context in catch block.

findings.title: Webhook secret rotation not documented
findings.description: Webhook secrets read from env() with no rotation mechanism or documentation. Key compromise requires full redeployment.
findings.remediation: Document rotation process. Consider dual-secret acceptance window for zero-downtime rotation.

findings.title: Deprecated controller action syntax
findings.description: Cashier payment route uses string concatenation PaymentController::class.'@show' instead of array syntax.
findings.remediation: Change to [PaymentController::class, 'show'].

findings.title: Missing return type hints on User relationship methods
findings.description: Relationship methods lack explicit return type hints. Functional but reduces IDE autocomplete and static analysis value.
findings.remediation: Add HasMany/BelongsTo return types to all relationship methods.

findings.title: AnalyticsGateway missing HTTP timeout configuration
findings.description: External HTTP request to Google Analytics has no timeout. Slow GA response could block request.
findings.remediation: Add Http::timeout(5) to the GA request.

findings.title: Hardcoded progress bar color instead of design token
findings.description: Navigation progress bar uses hardcoded #1e6dd9 instead of CSS variable.
findings.remediation: Extract to CSS variable or import from config.

findings.title: No dark mode or theme toggle tests
findings.description: Frontend tests don't verify theme switching works. Dark mode UI issues only caught manually.
findings.remediation: Add theme toggle integration test verifying CSS variable changes.

findings.title: E2E tests limited to auth flows only
findings.description: 6 E2E specs cover auth only. No tests for dashboard, billing, admin, or settings flows.
findings.remediation: Add E2E tests for critical authenticated flows (dashboard, billing checkout, admin panel).

findings.title: Supervisor config uses cPanel-specific PHP path
findings.description: /opt/cpanel/ea-php84/ path is hosting-provider-specific and won't work on other VPS setups.
findings.remediation: Use generic php path or add environment variable substitution.

findings.title: Missing deployment runbook and security policy
findings.description: No deployment runbook, security policy, or troubleshooting guide. Existing docs are development-focused.
findings.remediation: Create deployment runbook, security policy, and incident response guide.

findings.title: Missing standalone index on webhook_endpoints.user_id
findings.description: Composite index on (user_id, active) exists but queries filtering by user_id alone can't use it optimally.
findings.remediation: Add standalone index on user_id column.

strengths: Comprehensive rate limiting on auth endpoints with IP+email based throttling
Security headers middleware with CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options
Redis-locked billing operations preventing most concurrent mutation risks
Feature flag system with contract tests enforcing immutable invariants
DOMPurify integration for blog/pricing content (pattern exists, needs broader adoption)
Webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification with constant-time comparison
Query helper abstracting SQLite/MySQL differences for safe LIKE queries
Vite build stripping console/debugger statements in production
Comprehensive admin panel with 14 test files
Dark mode with semantic CSS tokens and 79+ dark: prefixes
Event-based audit logging with IP and user-agent tracking
Error boundary with fallback UI in React app
Lazy loading with Suspense boundaries for performance

sprint_1_launch_blockers: SEC-CRIT-001: Super admin gate on feature flag overrides
SEC-CRIT-002: Webhook replay protection for all providers
SEC-CRIT-004: DOMPurify on all JSON-LD components
SEC-HIGH-003: CSV injection prevention in exports
SEC-HIGH-004: Rate limiting on billing operations
SEC-HIGH-005: SSRF prevention on webhook URL validation
SEC-HIGH-006: Rate limit admin access attempts
sprint_2_security_compliance: SEC-CRIT-003: Time-window limits on admin queries
SEC-HIGH-001: Increase lock timeout + Stripe idempotency keys
SEC-HIGH-002: GDPR audit log deletion mechanism
SEC-HIGH-008: Transaction wrapper on trial start
SEC-MED-001: Verified middleware on export routes
SEC-MED-008: Validate Stripe price config on boot
sprint_3_test_quality: TEST-MED-012: MySQL test runner in CI
sprint_4_polish: SEC-MED-010: Align grace period with Stripe
UX-MED-019: QR code dark mode fix
UX-MED-021: Empty states in data list pages
